---
title: "Proposal pitch & upload to GitHub"
subtitle: "Week 4 Lab"
image: "yellow_shore_crab_hemigrapsus_oregonensis_id_odfw.jpg"

draft: false
about:
  id: description
  template: trestles
  image: "yellow_shore_crab_hemigrapsus_oregonensis_id_odfw.jpg"
  
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true  
---

::: {#description}
#### Lab Assignment:

Each research team will present their 10-15 minutes proposal pitch presentation in Week 4 Lab. 

#### 🎯 Lab Goals:

1.  Actively listen to each research team's pitch

2.  Provide constructive feedback to each research team on their pitch presentations

3.  Identify exact tank setups for each research team
    - Where their experimental tanks will be located (temperature)
    - What salinities they will be using in their experimental tanks
    - Any other relevant information about their experimental tanks (e.g., metals, added pollutants, habitat/substrate, EGC predator isolation, etc.)
    
4. Begin formatting data collection sheets
  - Each team setup a shared Google Sheet to use for data collection

:::
